refnamediv.refpurpose: Remove foreground objects connected to the image border.

listitem.para: A 2D binary or numeric image. Nonzero values are foreground.
4 or 8 pixel connectivity. The default is 8.
A boolean image with border-connected foreground objects removed.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: imclearborder keeps only foreground components that are completely separated from all four image borders under the selected connectivity.

refsection.title: Examples
